ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "emoji_sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment of the comment based on emoji analysis */,
  "caps_count" INTEGER /* Count of capital letters in the comment */,
  "yelling_alert" INTEGER /* Yelling alert based on the tone of the comment */,
  "profanity_score" REAL /* Profanity score of the comment */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity of the comment (range: -1 to 1) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity of the comment (range: 0 to 1) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the comment (in characters) */,
  "num_words" REAL /* Number of words in the comment */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source where the comment was collected */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source where the comment was collected (e.g., social media, forum, review) */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author who made the comment */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the comment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotion detected in the comment (e.g., happy, sad, angry) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the comment (e.g., product, service, company) */,
  "aspect" TEXT /* Aspect of the comment being analyzed (e.g., price, quality, service) */,
  "aspect_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the aspect (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "aspect_confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the aspect sentiment analysis (range: 0 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment analysis model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the sentiment analysis model (e.g., machine learning, rule-based) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment analysis model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_model_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being analyzed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  "analysis_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_model_mapping_analysis_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_model_mapping_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES sentiment_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_model_mapping_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_topics" (
  "comment_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment-topic mapping */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_topics_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
